top_signals.title: Trump insists negotiations are continuing despite Israel and Iran trading strikes
top_signals.summary: Iran and Israel striking each other threatens the fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran has been in place since early April.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: RBI Ramped Rupee Defense to Record Before Government Bazooka
top_signals.summary: To get a sense of the pressure India’s financial markets were straining under before a wave of support measures announced last week, look no further than the record amounts of dollars the central bank had committed to support the beleaguered rupee.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Those World Cup economic impacts in full…
Blackstone looks to shed $2bn of stakes in private investment funds
top_signals.summary: Blackstone is looking to offload over $2bn of stakes held in private investment funds, presenting a test of investors’ appetite for ageing private equity vehicles. The firm is promoting a so-called collateralised fund obligation (CFO), which will bundle more than $2bn (£1.5bn) of stakes in leveraged buyout funds into bonds to sell to investors and [...]

top_signals.title: OranjeWind Signs Long-Term CSOV Charter with Purus
top_signals.summary: The OranjeWind offshore wind project, a joint venture between RWE and TotalEnergies, has signed a five-year charter agreement with Purus for the construction and service operation vessel (CSOV) Purus Power.The vessel will support planned and…
